heroTitle: Step Up so others do not get stepped on
heroSubtitle: MiRiDom (Minority Rights Dominica) is an organization advocating for the fundamental rights of the LGBTQ+ community in Dominica. Together, let's build a more just and inclusive society.
missionText: Our mission is to promote, protect, and defend the fundamental rights of all people, regardless of their sexual orientation or gender identity, in Dominica and across the Caribbean.

content: MiRiDom (Minority Rights Dominica) is a civil society organization founded to defend the human rights of all people in Dominica, with a particular focus on the LGBTQ+ community.
mission: To promote, protect, and defend the fundamental rights of all people in Dominica.
vision: A Dominica where every person lives freely, with dignity and in safety.

content: MiRiDom is a non-profit organization. All information published on this site is provided for informational purposes only.
